value.found_quote: If you mention `@codex` in a comment with anything other than `review`, Codex starts a [cloud task](https://developers.openai.com/codex/cloud) using your pull request as context.
value.rationale: The page describes mentioning @codex in pull request comments to trigger reviews and delegate cloud tasks from GitHub. It covers requesting reviews ("mention `@codex review`"), acting on findings ("@codex fix the P1 issue"), and giving Codex other tasks via @codex mentions. This substantiates delegating from GitHub by tagging @codex on PRs (and the page references issues/PR context throughout). Presented as a currently available integration.
